title: Demo 2: dame loop capture ending on the original square.
description:
Demo 2: dame loop capture ending on the original square.

The white dame on F4 can capture four black pieces in a loop:
  F4 -> G5 -> H6 -> G7 -> F8 -> E7 -> D6 -> E5 -> F4

It captures G5, G7, E7, and E5, then lands back on F4.
In the REPL, try:
  > f4 f4
